title: [InstCombine] Fix miscompilation in PR83947
summary:
The developers generalized a masked scatter optimization by replacing a strict "all lanes active" check with a more flexible "any lane active" condition. Originally, the transform required `maskIsAllOneOrUndef`, which only matched when all mask elements were true/undef. The new `maskContainsAllOneOrUndef` utility returns true if at least one lane is true or undef, enabling the optimization when any store is guaranteed to occur.

This allows the scatter-to-store conversion to apply in cases where:
- The pointer is uniform (splat)
- The value is uniform (splat)
- At least one mask element is true/undef (ensuring the store isn't dead)

The generalization handles diverse mask patterns (all-true, partial-true, undef, mixed) while preserving correctness—dead lanes are ignored since a single active lane still necessitates the store. This pattern is reusable for other masked intrinsics (e.g., gather) where uniform inputs with any active lane can be simplified to scalar operations.
